description: A vulnerability exists in the web services to process SOAP requests in Schneider Electric's Modicon M340, Modicon Premium, Modicon Quantum PLC, BMXNOR0200 which could allow result in a buffer overflow.

product.name: Modicon M340, Modicon Premium, Modicon Quantum, BMXNOR0203

enisaIdProduct.product_version: All Modicon M340, Premium, Quantum PLCs and BMXNOR0203
